{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura Sage]] promised training support.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
